Academics About Us Contact Us News Admissions School of ICT The School of ICT at Global Technical College offers top-rated technology courses in Nairobi that prepare you for success in today’s fast-moving digital economy.

Whether you’re starting your tech journey or looking to upgrade your skills, our programs combine solid theoretical knowledge with practical, hands-on experience. From software development and networking to cybersecurity and data analysis, we provide training that matches current industry demands and equips you for rewarding

Programs Offered

  • Certificate in Information Technology – Learn computer systems, basic networking, and essential software skills.
  • Diploma in ICT – Explore programming, databases, system administration, and web technologies.
  • Advanced Diploma in ICT – Specialize in cybersecurity, cloud computing, and advanced software engineering.
  • Short Courses in Technology – Flexible training in web design, Microsoft Office, graphic design, and digital marketing.

 

Why Choose Our School of ICT?

  • Industry-Aligned Curriculum – Designed to meet the needs of employers in the tech sector.
  • Hands-On Learning – State-of-the-art computer labs with industry-standard tools.
  • Expert Lecturers – Learn from professionals with years of real-world ICT experience.
  • Career-Ready Skills – Graduate with practical abilities employers value most.
  • Flexible Study Options – Day, evening, and weekend classes available.

 

Career Opportunities

Graduates of our technology courses in Nairobi can pursue careers such as:

  • Software Developer
  • Network Administrator
  • Cybersecurity Analyst
  • IT Support Specialist
  • Web Designer
  • Data Entry & Database Manager
Eastleigh, 2nd Avenue, Section 1 Eastleigh, Nairobi – Kenya

+254799925625 info@globalcollege.ac.ke

Mon – Fri 9:00A.M. – 5:00P.M.

Apply now

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.
